title: altgirlinmall
description: alt girl in mall Gallery Krasnodar city
body: This resource pack adds Food Court Women to your Minecraft world, generating a shopping mall gallery where Nastik, Dashik, Liziks, and Andrey sit on the third floor. They share a single small fry among 67 people and film lip-sync videos that get 3 views. Coming soon: the ability to remove the women from the mall. Like and subscribe!
